column1: # Derived from the Unicode Character Database (Unihan), Unicode 17.0.0.
# Each line: <Han codepoint hex>\t<single Hangul syllable>.
#  - Traditional/shared: the standard South Korean (educational, "E" flag)
#    kHangul reading, else the first reading. Canonical (non-두음) form;
#    두음법칙 is applied at runtime by package hanja.
#  - Simplified: resolved via kTraditionalVariant to its Traditional form’s
#    reading, so 时→시, 发→발 (the Korean reading of the equivalent Hanja).
